scripts.build: pnpm --filter @retentiq/shared build && pnpm --filter @retentiq/db build && pnpm --filter @retentiq/api build && pnpm --filter @retentiq/web build
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @retentiq/shared build && pnpm --filter @retentiq/db build && pnpm --filter @retentiq/api build
scripts.prepare: node -e "try { if (!process.env.CI && process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && require('fs').existsSync('.git')) { require('child_process').execSync('husky', { stdio: 'inherit' }) } } catch (e) {}"
